preheader_text: The Interaction Deep Dive in CQA: review your scores, understand AI feedback, and prep for coaching conversations.
headline: Meet the Interaction Deep Dive
subheadline: Review your scores, understand AI feedback, and prep for coaching — all from one screen.
hero_image_alt: Interaction Deep Dive preview showing a call recording and quality profile
intro_html: Every one of your customer calls is scored by CQA. But did you know you can see exactly why each call received the score it did? The Interaction Deep Dive page gives you complete transparency into every score.
what_is_heading: What is the Interaction Deep Dive?
what_is_html: When you click on any call in the Analysis List, you open its full detail view. This is where you go beyond the score and understand the reasoning behind it — with the recording, transcript, scorecard, and AI reasoning all in one place.
section_heading: What can you do with it?
step_1_description: Play back the full call directly in the platform, no downloads needed
step_2_description: See the complete conversation in text, so you can follow along with what was said
step_3_description: See scores broken down by category and sub-category, and expand any section to view individual KPI results
step_4_description: Click any KPI to see exactly which parts of the conversation led to a pass or fail, so you know precisely what happened
step_5_description: Disagree with a KPI score? Click "Raise Dispute", add your reasoning, and your supervisor will review it
training_heading: Watch Training and Navigation of CQA platform on your HSL LMS platform NOW.
cta_primary_label: Click here to access the videos
try_it_html: Log into CQA, open the Analysis List, and click on any call to explore the full detail view.
footer_disclaimer: You're receiving this because you're an agent on CQA.
